race.comment: ZOU BIG BOY (1) couldn't go on with the job last time at Scone when fading into fourth after leading them up. Holds genuine claims on best figures and gets an important 4kg claim. Will prove tough to reel in if left alone in front. BONFIDELITY (3) battled away soundly into fourth last start over 2245m at Grafton, an improvement on her fifth at this track the run before. Mikayla Weir gets the best out of this four-year-old mare and is well placed to play a major role. FLASH PRINCE (9) was a dominant winner fresh but has struggled since. At peak fitness now and holds claims on best form. MS HUBBLE (8) draws to get the cosy run and is another that is in the mix.
